posts.raw_content: My father in law passed away unexpectedly just around midnight tonight. He was a great patriot. America first to the core. A staunch 2A defender. And a fantastic dad and an even better grandpa to my little girl. God saw fit to call him home. One minute he was here and the next he was gone. My wife and i are devestated. And our little one will miss the playdate with her papa tomorrow. My only regret is we didn't tell him my wife was pregnant with kid #2. We just didn't expect him to be gone so suddenly. Anyways. Thanks for listening pedes.
